items.title: Role of US officials killed in crash in Mexico under scrutiny
items.dek: The two died in a car crash after a Mexican-led operation to destroy a clandestine drug lab.
items.body: The two died in a car crash after a Mexican-led operation to destroy a clandestine drug lab.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Zelensky says failure of US envoys to visit Kyiv is 'disrespectful'
items.dek: US envoy Steve Witkoff and Donald Trump's son-in-law Jared Kushner have travelled to Moscow several times, but never to Kyiv.
items.body: US envoy Steve Witkoff and Donald Trump's son-in-law Jared Kushner have travelled to Moscow several times, but never to Kyiv.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: How will Apple change under 'product guy' John Ternus?
items.dek: As Tim Cook announces his departure from the top job at Apple, these are the key challenges for new boss John Ternus.
